title: Creation & the Fall
subtitle: Genesis 1–11
theme: God creates all things good; humanity falls into sin and death

title: The Covenant People
subtitle: Genesis 12 – Exodus 1
theme: God chooses Abraham and builds a people through His covenant promises

title: Exodus & the Law
subtitle: Exodus 2–40; Leviticus; Numbers; Deuteronomy
theme: God delivers His people from slavery and gives them His Law

title: Conquest & Kingdom
subtitle: Joshua; Judges; Ruth; 1–2 Samuel; 1 Kings 1–11
theme: God brings His people into the land and raises up kings

title: Division, Exile & the Prophets
subtitle: 1 Kings 12 – 2 Kings; Isaiah; Jeremiah; Ezekiel; Minor Prophets
theme: Israel's unfaithfulness leads to exile; God promises restoration

title: The Life of Jesus
subtitle: Matthew; Mark; Luke; John
theme: God takes on human flesh; the kingdom of God arrives in Christ

title: The Cross & Resurrection
subtitle: The Passion Narratives; Acts 1–2
theme: Christ suffers, dies, rises, and pours out the Holy Spirit

title: The Church & the New Creation
subtitle: Acts; Epistles; Revelation
theme: The Spirit-led Church carries the Gospel to the ends of the earth
